query:
-- Get all media from demo project
SELECT id, filename, mediaType, flightId, latitude, longitude 
FROM media 
WHERE projectId = 1 
ORDER BY id;

-- Get all flights from demo project
SELECT id, name, description, createdAt 
FROM flight 
WHERE projectId = 1 
ORDER BY id;
